prior_attempts.root_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: Use a post-order traversal to identify mergeable sibling ranges.
JUSTIFICATION: Post-order traversal ensures that all children of a node are processed and merged into their final sibling configurations before the parent node itself is processed, ensuring that any merge operations involving siblings are completed in the correct dependency order.
prior_attempts.final_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: Use a post-order traversal to identify mergeable sibling ranges.
JUSTIFICATION: Post-order traversal ensures that all children of a node are processed and merged into their final sibling configurations before the parent node itself is processed, ensuring that any merge operations involving siblings are completed in the correct dependency order.
